rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex terminators
Preserve only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Use only valid scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Repair only the diagnostic context; do not change unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in guarantees and assumptions
Place guarantees and assumptions in the correct scope (type or implementation)
Use only valid scalar types (int, real, bool) in AGREE contracts
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use invalid scalar types (e.g., integer, boolean) in AGREE contracts
Do not place implementation-level references in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics that do not match the current diagnostic context
